description: Lines 411-441 (check_stuck_recovery, check_semaphore_health) and 565-631 (log_heartbeat, start_health_reporter) are health monitoring/reporting concerns. Extract into a dedicated module (e.g. src/fetcher/refresh_health_reporter.cr). The start_health_reporter method (50 lines) especially is a standalone periodic reporting loop that accesses memory status, socket counts, event clients, and fiber stats - clearly a different responsibility than refresh cycle orchestration.
title: Extract health monitoring into RefreshHealthReporter module
